name: 拯救骑士 save the knight
short_description: 拯救骑士 is a 2D horizontal panel pixel puzzle game where players take on the role of a female hero to challenge various powerful enemies and save the knight.
detailed_description:
拯救骑士 is a 2D horizontal panel pixel puzzle game where players take on the role of a female hero to challenge various powerful enemies and save the knight.

Characteristic：

-12 meticulously designed levels
-A slightly dangerous but not complicated trap
-BOSS with diverse styles

Specification：

-This is an independent game created by one person, so I apologize in advance for any possible issues that may arise
-Players should try to earn points as much as possible to receive enhancements
-I hope everyone can have a pleasant time playing
